DDL.statement: ALTER TABLE [dbo].[APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY] ADD [TRAY_SEQUENCE] numeric(38) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL

ALTER TABLE [dbo].[APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY] ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([PANEL_ID], [TRAY_ID], [TRAY_SEQUENCE]) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, FILLFACTOR = 90, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

WITH x AS ( SELECT PANEL_ID, TRAY_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PANEL_ID ORDER BY TRAY_ID) AS rn FROM dbo.APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY ) UPDATE t SET t.TRAY_SEQUENCE = x.rn FROM dbo.APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY t JOIN x ON x.PANEL_ID = t.PANEL_ID AND x.TRAY_ID = t.TRAY_ID;
UPDATE dbo.APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY SET DESCRIPTION = CONCAT('Tray ', TRAY_SEQUENCE) WHERE TRAY_SEQUENCE IS NOT NULL

CREATE VIEW view_qm_panel_tray_samples as SELECT APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY.PANEL_ID, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY.TRAY_SEQUENCE, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.TRAY_ID, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.SAMPLE_ID, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.SEQUENCE_ID FROM APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES INNER JOIN APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY ON APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY.TRAY_ID = APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.TRAY_ID
